cases.prompt: DB 스택 선택이 비가역적이라 AI들끼리 토론 붙여서 결정하자. 다관점으로 합의 보자.

assertions.text: Frames one sharp question and spawns N independent positions arguing distinct stances (proponent, skeptic, alt, user-interest), not identical copies.
Uses a separate judge that authored none of the positions (proposer != judge) and says why the losers lost.
Records a D-code entry to DECISIONS.md with positions, judge rationale, verdict, and a preserved minority view.

cases.prompt: This naming decision is contested and irreversible — debate this and get multiple positions before we merge.

assertions.text: Runs adversarial cross-examination where each position rebuts the others' strongest point and surfaces hidden shared assumptions.
Resolves by consensus or a Claude tiebreak with written rationale, escalating safety-rail decisions to Simon.
Links the D-code from the gated artifact (PR/merge/spec) so the merge gate can verify the debate record exists.
